title: Spicy Syrian Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry made with juicy chicken, crispy almonds and a mix of Syrian spices.
instructions: Heat the spicy olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the Syrian spices and cook for 1 minute.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and spices.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is coated in the spicy sauce.
Sprinkle with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced almonds.
Optional: Serve with a side of steamed rice or couscous.
